signals.title: AUD/JPY — G8 Bilateral Theme + Carry
signals.text: AUD/JPY at 114.635 — AUD 1W avg: +1.032% (n=4) outperforms JPY 1W avg: -0.605% (n=7) with G8 spread: 1.637%. RBA 4.35% vs BoJ 0.75% — +360bp carry favors AUD. Strong theme with AUD outperformance and JPY underperformance, supported by carry advantage. Watch for AUD/JPY to extend gains on next BoJ meeting (mkt: 40% hike priced).

signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 157.78 — 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; Middle East tensions introduce intervention risk on a break above 160.00. JPY COT LF short −61,340 (crowded carry). Carry dominates until VIX > 25. Watch for next Fed meeting (mkt: 100% hold priced) to confirm carry advantage.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −19,294 (specs fading a hawkish CB) vs RBNZ hike 40% priced for 27 May. If RBNZ delivers or signals hike, short-squeeze risk is elevated — crowded spec short unwind targets 0.6000+. NZD/USD at 0.5942. Watch for next RBNZ meeting (mkt: 40% hike priced) to confirm hike expectations.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Retail Sentiment + COT
signals.text: AUD/USD: COT LF net long +58,994 (bullish spec positioning) vs retail 13% long (extreme retail short). Divergence active: retail is fading the institutional long. Late-trend caution; retail capitulation risk if price extends higher. AUD/USD at 0.7268. Watch for next CFTC report to confirm positioning.

signals.title: EUR/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: HV30 at 8.2%, ATM IV at 9.4% — 1.2 vol-pt premium over realized. 25d RR at −0.14: put skew despite bullish trend — market hedging, not chasing. LF net -21,011, WoW delta -1,101 second consecutive week. Price bid, positioning stalling — late-trend caution. EUR/USD at 1.1718. Watch for next ECB meeting (mkt: 100% hold priced) to confirm rate expectations.
